notes: Join OCR lines into paragraphs with space separator and resolve end-of-line hyphenation. CER improved from 0.1107 to 0.0952.
VNDetectDocumentSegmentationRequest + crop to detected region. Score regressed massively - document segmentation crops incorrectly on book pages.
Add page number extraction from top/bottom 15% margin observations. Page number accuracy: 0.0 -> 0.382.
Filter facing-page text by keeping only the dominant text column (left/right side). CER improved from 0.0952 to 0.0846.
Improved facing-page filter using body column overlap detection instead of simple left/right split. CER improved from 0.0846 to 0.0239.
Improved page number extraction to parse numbers from running headers/footers (not just standalone). Page accuracy: 0.382 -> 0.559.
Filter running headers/footers from body text. Remove short lines in top/bottom 10% margin that are narrower than 70% of median line width. CER improved from 0.0239 to 0.0200.
Sort observations by descending Y for top-to-bottom reading order. Score regressed from 0.0285 to 0.0313 - naive Y-sorting breaks reading order for some pages.
Improved page number extraction: parse numbers with attached punctuation (e.g. 86•), prefer header-embedded numbers over small standalone numbers (footnote markers). Page accuracy: 0.559 -> 0.588.
Set recognitionLanguages to en/fr/it/de. No change - Vision auto-detects language already.
Add CIColorControls contrast enhancement (contrast=1.1, brightness=0.02) before OCR. CER: 0.0200->0.0192, page accuracy: 0.588->0.618.
Widen page number margin threshold from 15% to 20%. Page accuracy: 0.618->0.706 (+3 correct). CER unchanged.
Paragraph break detection using vertical gaps between observations. CER regressed - gap thresholds not well-calibrated across book formats.
Add colon to sentence enders for dialogue paragraph breaks. CER: 0.0192->0.0191. Helps with dialogue-heavy Italian/French text.
Widen page number margin threshold from 20% to 25%. Page accuracy: 0.706->0.794 (+3 correct). CER unchanged.
Filter low-confidence observations (<0.2). No change - all observations already have sufficient confidence.
Expand header filter margin from 10% to 12%. CER improved: 0.0191->0.0179. Catches more running headers.
Increase header filter width threshold from 70% to 80%. Regressed - too aggressive, removes short body text lines in margins.
Fallback page number extraction from first/last body observation when margin detection fails. Page accuracy: 0.794->0.853 (+2). CER unchanged.
Fallback page number: also run when primary finds <10, and scan first 3 + last 2 observations. Page accuracy: 0.853->0.882.
Tighten facing-page overlap threshold from 0.3 to 0.35. Small CER improvement: 0.01792->0.01787.
Strip running header prefix from body text when pattern [title words] [number] [lowercase body] is detected. CER: 0.01787->0.01732.
Handle German guillemet dialogue: add « to sentence enders and » to paragraph starts. CER: 0.01732->0.01728.
Strip trailing page number from body text when Vision merges it with last line. CER: 0.01697->0.01650. 11 samples affected.
UITextChecker spell checking post-processing. CER regressed from 0.01650 to 0.01956 - spell checker too aggressive, changing valid words incorrectly.
Conservative spell checking (edit distance ≤2, ≥4 chars, letters only). CER still regressed from 0.01650 to 0.01798 - UITextChecker changing correct literary words.
Ultra-conservative spell checking (edit distance 1, ≥5 chars, lowercase only). Nearly neutral but still slightly regressed CER 0.01650→0.01654.

Expand stripRunningHeader search range from 5 to 8 words (maxSplits 10→14, bodyStartIdx guard 6→9). Catches longer headers like 'Debacle: Lorraine, Ardennes, Charleroi, Mons » 267'. CER: 0.01650→0.01573.
